title: Into the Mire
description: A research team is trapped in the Void Mire. They have critical data about the Sovereign.

stages.text: Researcher Nola is frantic. 'My team — they went into the Mire three days ago to study the void leech colonies. Their last transmission said they found something incredible — data about the Sovereign's weaknesses. Then silence. Please, bring them back.'

choices.label: Trace their signal through the Mire
Push through the Mire by force

stages.text: You find them — alive but trapped on a shrinking island of reality in the mire. The void leeches have been draining the island. Two researchers are unconscious. The lead researcher clutches a data crystal. 'We found it — the Sovereign's binding point. Take this to the Bastion. It could save everything.'

choices.label: Carry them all out through the Mire
Create a reality bridge for extraction
Fight off the leeches to buy time

stages.text: All three researchers are extracted alive. Nola weeps with relief. The data crystal is delivered to the Bastion's scholars. 'This changes everything,' Vera whispers, studying the contents. 'We can fight the Sovereign. We actually have a chance.'
